game.title: SHOTGUANA
game.short_text: A shotguana and their trucker friend run out of gas twice

details.title: SHOTGUANA
details.description:
A short RPG where a trucker and his dear friend (An iguana with a shotgun for a head) make a couple stops on a long dusty highway. 

Made in 14 days for Pirate Software jam, with the theme "You Are the Weapon", the game acts like a classic monster battler, except you control the monster in real time, moving around on a grid while the 'trainers' shout commands over your head.
+ The Winner of Pirate Jam 16 +

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.9 out of 5 stars(16 total ratings)

game.title: Sundial
game.short_text: Gnomon carries the Sundial, a weapon capable of destroying all life. What will he do with it?

details.title: Sundial
details.description:
WARNING: Contains flashing lightsSundial
    In the not-so-distant past, a group of sociopathic scientists  gathered to create the ultimate superweapon, capable of destroying all  life on the planet. The result of their experiment was Gnomon, a  cybernetic being with an integrated weapon module code-named "Sundial".  The Sundial's power was real, as evidenced by the  scientists' vaporization thirty seconds after Gnomon's boot-up. However,  the scientists' failed to account for an unknown variable. This unknown  variable, be it God or Fate, endowed Gnomon with a merciful nature  shortly after its boot-up. It was due to this mercy that Gnomon was  capable of refusing its purpose: to Detonate.
  
    Gnomon, of course, was horrified by its purpose and the instant  vaporization of its creators. Vowing not to allow the Cleansing Light to  claim any more lives, Gnomon set off in search of a way to deactivate  its Sundial...
    
    You are Gnomon.
Controls
Full screen is recommended
Movement: WASD
Interact: Left Click or Spacebar
Pause: Backspace or Esc
Camera Rotation: Mouse
About the Game
Made by the Voxelith Creation Team
Tools used:
Aseprite
 Blender
Godot 4.3
Reaper
Audacity
GIMP

details.title: Indigo Satellite (Game Jam Version)
details.description:
"A" & "D" to run."SPACE" or "W" to jump."E" or "J" to punch."SHIFT" or "K" to do the dash.


You are Zero, the first pilot-able robot on Earth.
You used to complete missions with your human pilot as your partner and controller of your brute strength.
This time however, the weapon has been taken away from your pilot's hands, and you're now on your own, as you're in your path to stop the rogue robot Phobos, from their mission to take over mankind.
The path is not straightforward, only downwards, further and further into the abandoned lab. Your home.

- Submission for the Pirate Software's Game Jam 16 -


Art: Rusty Lights, Ryaninho.Game design: Rusty Lights, Ryaninho.Programming: Rusty Lights, Ryaninho, Bytes dev.Music & SFX: Laserpointers.
Soundtrack: https://soundcloud.com/user-552289138/sets/indigo-satellite-ost

details.title: Operation EOS
details.description:
Operation EOS is a text based atmospheric horror game which takes place on a space station. The player must use a set of terminal commands in an effort to uncover hidden mysteries that lie within the cosmos.
Requires a keyboard and mouse. Headphones are recommended.  Browser hardware acceleration is encouraged.GDD

game.short_text: Play as a Virus and break out of a research facility by taking control of any living creature you can find.

details.title: Bioweapon
details.description:
Play as a Virus and break out of a research facility by taking control of any living creature you can find.
Please play in fullscreen! Otherwise you might not be able to see the edges of the screen.
General Controls:
WASD- Movement and steeringSpacebar- JumpE- InteractMouse - AimRight Mouse Button- FireR- Restart Level
Join Pipotchi's Gamedev discord here!: https://discord.gg/bSGrGjdncUCharacter Specific Controls:
Virus Controls:WASD - SteeringRight mouse button - Fire
Host Controls (Zombie):A & D - Move left and rightSpace - JumpRight mouse button - Fire
Host Controls (Rat):A & D - Move left and rightW & S - Move up and down (When inside a vent)Space - JumpRight mouse button - Fire
Host Controls (Plant):WASD - Choose direction to growRight mouse button - FirePirateJam 16 2025 Game Jam Winner (6th Place)
Made in Unity by:
Lyoko: Coding, Sprites/Animation, ConceptPipotchi: Level Design + Mechanics, Coding, Visuals

game.short_text: Join the RAPIER program, and be the sword amongst the stars, the weapon that protects us from above.

details.title: From Above
details.description:
Join the RAPIER  program, become the sword amongst the stars, the weapon that protects us from above. It's time to wake up, soldier. Best of luck.
We'd love to hear about your experience, what you enjoyed, how it made you feel, and any feedback you have for us to consider for any patches we may apply to this project in the future!.If you entered the jam, congratulations, and we can't wait to check out your submissions!
A game by JamesYJ, OrcaOfTime, GentlyRotting, RoryMcBig and PiersSK.

Thanks for playing our game!
Additional Credits:

game.title: Reincarnated as a Glock
game.short_text: A love story about a man and his gun --- from the perspective of the gun.

details.title: Reincarnated as a Glock
details.description:
IMPORTANT: PLEASE DON'T SCROLL (it will break the game). Also if you are unable to type, clicking the text should fix this.
Reincarnated as a Glock (RaaG) is an interactive webcomic about a girl who becomes a gun and has to work with a soldier in a post-apocalyptic world.
How to Play
⚔️ Your words are your weapon! Type the highlighted letters (A-Z) to move through the dialogue. In combat, type fast and accurately to win!
Important
This game is tested and optimized for Chrome, so you may run into technical issues while playing on a different browser. If you are on Chrome and still have problems, try playing directly on Vercel. Otherwise, please leave a note below and I will do my best to address it ASAP. Thanks! -Viv
---
Credits
Game design, art, music, programming: Vivienne Ooi
Game Jam: Pirate Software - Gam Jam 16
Tools
Game Engine: React [ Hosted on Vercel ]
Art: Procreate
Music/SFX: Ableton Live 11
Code: GitHub

game.title: Purr-formance Review
game.short_text: Kitty is seeking a promotion to Cat-astrophe Manager. Destroy the office and cause mayhem!

details.title: Purr-formance Review
details.description:
~~ Made for PirateSoftware's 16th Game Jam (Winter '25) ~~
~~ Honorable Mention Game! ~~
You are a kitty living in a busy office. Can you meet your Kitty Key Purr-formance Indicators (KKPIs) to earn a promotion to Cat-astrophe Manager? 
Create office cat-astrophes in this stealth and puzzle based game. How high of a rating can you get on your purr-formance review by the end of the week? Keep your kitty eyes peeled for extra secret tasks to earn yourself extra points for your purr-formance review!
Comment your Purr-formance Rating, difficulty level, last day, and whether you got a promotion to be added to the Google Sheets Leaderboard!

~~ Last Updated: February 16th, 2025 ~~
Latest addition: A cutscene for winning the game and earning your promotion!


~~ Story ~~
You are a kitty living in a busy office. You are a Jr Catuary for the Cat Distribution System stationed at Office Corp… but a promotion to Cat-astrophe Manager is within your grasp… if you pass a week long purr-formance review. Complete all your Kitty Key Purr-formance Indicators (KKPIs) each day to earn your promotion! 

Watch out though, Bob, the Lead of Cleanliness at Office Corp, is also seeking a promotion. He needs to keep the office clean and tidy to get his promotion to Assistant to the Manager. He is getting more and more angry the messier the office gets. He is quick when he is mad so watch out!



CREDITS

Cat Sprite: Elthen (recolored by me)
Humans & Environment:  LimeZu
Font: me (kyraltre)
Kitty 'Bap' and 'Meow' sounds: me (kyraltre)
Dialogue Handler: Dialogic 2
Game Engine: Godot 4.3
Art Software: Aseprite
Music - All from freepd.com"Inspiration" by Rafael Krux
"Driving Concern" by Kevin MacLeod
"Natural Vibes" by Kevin MacLeod
"City Sunshine" by Kevin MacLeod
"Patron Saint of Heists" by Bryon Tech
"Bleu" by Komiku
"Happy Whistling Ukulele" by Rafael Krux

game.title: Barugi
game.short_text: Strategy game - combine spells and find most optimal moves

details.title: Barugi
details.description:
Barugi is a Turn-based strategy game. Magical cannon Barugi needs your help to defend city from horde of goblins and werewolves.
Meticulously choose your spells with unique abilities to find the best possible outcome. Fire, Ice, Lighting, Metal combine them all! 
Endless waves are randomly generated for maximum replayability!
Click on spell cards to select, and then click on enemies to attack.

game.title: Solar Bloom
game.short_text: Maintain the star active to keep your solar system alive. How long can you survive?

details.title: Solar Bloom
details.description:
Solar Bloom is a cosmic simulation arcade rogue-like in which you play as a lone Star, trying to create and maintain a solar system for as long as you can. Choose one of three stars, manage your resources, make crucial sacrifices and try to obtain as high a score as possible. Good luck!
Controls:
Left Click - shoot a solar flare and destroy asteroids or planets, although you might want to avoid that :) Right Click - use a solar wind to pull planets closer to your orbit (and even in yourself for some sweet bonuses), or asteroids to create new planetsScroll Wheel - zoom in/outArrow keys, A, B - a certain company's code :)
Get the soundtrack here: Solar Bloom OST by Arya Elfakyn (Sidhe Noise)Asset credits:
Pixel Space Background Generator by Deep-FoldPixel Planet Generator by Deep-FoldBullet Impact Explosion by BDragon1727Basic Pixel Health bar and Scroll bar by BDragon1727Icons and artwork by M4RY4NNLicensed Sound Effects (General Series 6000)
Feedback:
Feel free to leave any feedback in the comments below. We are happy to see what people thought of our game! :)

details.title: Vicious Verses
details.description:
Your goal is to use cards to deal damage to beat enemies. Click to play cards and load them into phrases, after battle buy cards and phrases to change your deck and journal!
Step into the role of a quick-witted bard in a roguelite deckbuilder where words are your weapon! Travel from tavern to tavern, crafting sharp insults using your personalized deck of nouns, verbs, and phrases. Win over audiences to earn gold, upgrade your journal, and unlock new cards. Each duel is a test of creativity, strategy, and humor as you strive to become the most legendary wordsmith in the kingdom. Wit isn’t just might—it’s everything!The VV team will be continuing Development to make the game after the game jam.Give us some feedback on what we did well and what you'd like to see!

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 5.0 out of 5 stars(1 total ratings)

details.title: Plague Control
details.description:
Plague Protocol is a real-time, deck building, unit defence, 2D pixel-art game. You play as the IMMUNE SYSTEM and your goal is to protect the cells within the body from pathogens. Your cards enable you to do different actions, from sending out peptides to damage BACTERIA to preventing VIRUSES from duplicating. Afterall, you are the body's natural defence system, YOU ARE THE WEAPON.
PLAYING IN FULL SCREEN IS RECOMMENDED!You can pause the game at any point with "p". You can open options with space or esc (esc closes full screen on itch.io though!)
The GDD can be found here.

game.title: Boom or Doom
game.short_text: Control a cursed demon that must explode others to survive

details.title: Boom or Doom
details.description:
Made for the Pirate Game Jam 2025 (Theme - YOU ARE THE WEAPON)
Control a little demon that is eternally cursed to explode every 10 seconds, if you want to keep living, you must take others to the grave with you!  Travel through an endless dungeon and take as many with you as possible. Fight against other players for the top score and collect resources through the game to unlock power ups that will help you in your run.
*******CONTROLS****************** (Advice to play tutorial as well)
****************************************
MOVEMENT - AWSD
EXPLODE MANUALLY - LEFT CLICK
HOOK ENEMIES TOWARDS YOU - RIGHT CLICK
DASH - SPACEBAR
ULTIMATE ABILITY - R
***************************************

***********THEME INTERPRETATION*********************
**************************************************************
YOU ARE THE WEAPON - You the player are forced to find enemies to explode if you dont want to die. Enemies will panic when they see you and your objective is to get the highest score you can (and fight players in the top 10 leaderboard). Power ups will help you through each run that enhance the main mechanics of the game.

********GAME DESIGN DOCUMENT**********************
GDD REFERENCE: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tirnz1UvmNDMgFWnOLzqUpF8arpXvY5974K43nkEfFo/...
